rulings.Case Title: FRANCES SUSSNA VS. PRIME OLD COUNTY LP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 3, 2013, line 7 PLAINTIFF FRANCES SUSSNA Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And For Sanctions is continued to October 7, 2013 on Court's own motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE FRONT STREET BUILDING LLC VS. TELMATE LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment; Application For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment After Hearing
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 3, 2013, line 1 PLAINTIFF THE FRONT STREET BUILDING, LLC Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment; Application For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment After Hearing is continued to October 18, 2013. Defendant shall file a sur-reply addressing the issue of bond increase raised in the reply. Sur-reply shall be filed and served no later than October 11, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ART WALKER VS. PENNYMAC LOAN SERVICES, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Stay Unlawful Detainer
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 4, 2013, line 2 PLAINTIFF ART WALKER's Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Unlawful Detainer is continued to October 10, 2013. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 501 no later than October 4, 2013 by 4 p.m. = (501/REQ)
